text: Hi Alex, I reviewed the port side engine report and recommend replacing the lower hose before the next service.
Thanks. Does the replacement hose require a specific fitting size or can we use the standard 1-inch marine hose?
Use the standard 1-inch marine hose, but source the reinforced type rated for saltwater service.
Understood. I will order the reinforced hose and bring it to the dock tomorrow morning.
Great. Also check the clamp condition on the starboard intake while you are there.
Will do. I’ll send you an update once the hose and clamp checks are complete.
